title: rosa dumalis f. kupcokii
intro: Rosa dumalis f. kupcokii, also known as the Rosa dumalis f. kupcokii or cupped rose, is a fragrant, cup-shaped variant of the Rosa dumalis species, a type of flowering plant in the rose family. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Rosa dumalis f. kupcokii include relief from minor wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues, while also promoting overall well-being and reducing stress. The plant can be prepared as an herbal infusion, tincture, or salve, and is often used in traditional folk medicine to support physical and emotional health.
